title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still getting an 'Invalid Credentials' error.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive on Chrome.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it in the settings, but it still displays the old one on the receipt.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount in their bank account yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA SMS codes on their registered phone number, locking them out of the platform.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture (JPEG, 2MB) but gets an 'Upload failed' error every time.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their yearly subscription, but the toggle switch is greyed out.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but didn't receive a confirmation email even though the payment was successfully deducted.

title: Missing Item in Delivery
description: Customer received their package today, but one of the three items ordered is missing from the box.

title: Account Temporarily Locked
description: Customer's account was locked due to suspicious activity. They need help verifying their identity to unlock it.

title: Unrecognized Charge on Statement
description: Customer sees a $14.99 charge on their credit card statement that they do not recognize and is requesting details.

title: API Key Update Required
description: Developer reports their production API key expired without prior notification, causing downtime for their app.

title: How to Change Email Address?
description: Customer wants to transfer their account to a new email address but cannot find the option in the account settings.
